title: Bergen Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Bergen, with a Z-Score of -3.09. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10.
body:
The city is experiencing extremely low temperatures, with a significant impact on daily life. 
 The HDD value of 11.8 GG indicates a high demand for heating. 
 The humidity level of 76% and wind speed of 4.7 km/h are exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to ensure public safety and minimize disruptions.
